name: Jules Harding & Kira Vasilyeva | Your Girlfriends?
description:
"So, I guess we're doing this?"
"I guess we fucking are."

***

To think that your final year of university would start with such a rollercoaster ride. After one drunken mistake and a heartfelt confession, you find yourself in a throuple with both of your best friends since childhood. This could be the start of something new, for new memories to flourish and bloom; or the end of old connections, leaving the memories to wither and wilt.

***

What happens when you wake up next to your childhood best friend in your underwear, who was also dating your other childhood best friend? That was the predicament Kira found herself in. Unable to bear the guilt, she admitted her wrongdoings to Jules, expecting a brutal beatdown.

Jules, on the other hand, was deeply hurt; yet she couldn't blame anyone but herself and her overworking. Not willing to lose her best friends, Jules offered a Hail Mary: for the three of them to become a throuple.

***

Part three out of two of my bots inspired by the song Be My Mistake - The 1975. Yeah, I did not expect to create a third part to series but here I am 💀 I finally had the time to sit and roleplay with the two and I love them both too much for it all to end in angst so I'm going to make the best ending possible damn it! If this is your first time seeing these two characters, I HIGHLY RECCOMMEND YOU USE THE FIRST TWO PARTS!!!

From my testing, the bot rarely speaks for the user at all so I hope that stays consistent. For those curious, I put the generation settings at a temp of 1.2 and 800 max tokens (I also turn text streaming off because I heard it helps get better responses but I can't verify that). Hopefully there's not too much speaking for user but it helps to have longer replies.

Please leave a review if you enjoyed, and if there is any criticisms you might have! If the bot speaks for you, edit out the message and rate the generation accordingly, and use the chat memory to highlight key events. Blank negative reviews will be removed so if you had an issue with the bot please make sure to let me know!

I've got a Discord server you can join by cliking the link here!

Part One: Jules Harding | Your Neglectful Girlfriend

Part Two: Kira Vasilyeva | W
creator: AloofRaccoon
